analysis.reasoning: Core message: The tweet announces new EU priorities for cooperation with the Council of Europe on Rule of Law, focusing on fighting corruption and protecting whistleblowers, and invites participation in an informational event. Evaluation: EU1 (successful story) – not explicitly about historical success or overcoming past obstacles; no. EU2 (unity) – no mention of member-state unity or solidarity; no. EU3 (useful for citizens) – yes: presents concrete EU actions (anti-corruption, whistleblower protection, Rule of Law mechanism) that address citizens’ concerns and implies practical benefits within the EU. EU4 (avant-garde) – not framed as pioneering leadership or first-mover regulation; ambiguous, but insufficient evidence; no. EU5 (global champion of fair causes) – focuses on internal rule of law rather than global defense of rights; no. EU6 (better world) – cooperation with CoE is multilateral, but the focus is internal EU mechanism; insufficient to claim global contribution; no. Conclusion: The tweet promotes EU3.
